summary: Slice 2 QA smoke validation complete. All 12 items PASS across 3 roles (Central, Master, Outlet). Backend 10/10 pytest passing; Frontend UI verified via Playwright with screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: All 12 Slice 2 items verified end-to-end across Central/Master/Outlet roles
Status Timeline correctly handles all states: requested/approved/dispatched/received, partially_received, cancelled, rejected (verified #101 and #110)
Resolution Details card on #110 shows Type: Partial Return, Reason, totals (Accepted 7 / Rejected 3 / Damaged 3 / Returned 3)
Line items table shows per-line Accepted, Rejected, Resolution columns (Paneer 10kg → 7 accepted, 3 rejected, Damaged)

Operations Hub: Central shows 3 KPIs (Pending Approvals 3, Ready to Dispatch 1, Pending Receives 0). Master shows 4 KPIs (incl. My Requests 1). Outlet shows 2 KPIs (Pending Receives 0, My Requests 2). No KPI placeholder anywhere
Ready to Dispatch tab is present in Pending Queues with count badge '1' and Transfer #104 (Approved) listed
Items count column visible in queue tables ('2 items', '3 items', '1 item')
Contextual action buttons: #101 (requested) → Approve + Reject for Central; write APIs correctly disabled with 'Write API pending / blocked in Phase 1 limited slice'
Hierarchy Summary: Date Range Picker opens with Quick Select presets (Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Last 7 Days, Last 30 Days) + calendar
Downward visibility: Central sees both 'Master Stores' + 'Outlets' tabs; Master sees only 'Outlets' (verified iter 3); Outlet UI shows 'Context locked' indicator
Terminology mapping correct: master→Central Store, central→Master Store, franchise→Outlet (badges verified in headers)
Timestamps consistently formatted using date-fns ('20 May 2026, 3:12 AM'); no raw ISO strings observed
Context selector: 'View as store' button present for Central & Master; replaced by 'Context locked' badge for Outlet
Read-only mode banner clearly displayed on all roles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slice 2 fully validated. Transfer IDs for state coverage: #101 requested, #104 approved (Ready to Dispatch), #108 received, #110 partially received w/ damaged resolution, #111 cancelled w/ Return-to-Source, #112 rejected. Use 3 role accounts in test_credentials.md. Backend proxies auth to preprod.mygenie.online; all other endpoints use seed_data.py. Write APIs intentionally blocked in Phase 1 Limited Slice.
